author: Jack Princz

notes: Exact current-session rerun used the record-local script snapshot and local dataset/tokenizer paths.
Metric semantics were preserved from the record-local script; compare only against records with matching evaluation mode.
See the local run log for the concrete throughput and final metric lines on this host.
claimed_run_name: Record: 11L Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + XSA4
submission_blurb: 11 layers with Partial RoPE (16 of 64 dims), LN Scale (1/sqrt(l+1)), EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997), Exclusive Self Attention (XSA) on last 4 layers. Int6 per-row on all MLP+attention weights, int8 tok_emb, zstd-22. Weight decay 0.04 (Muon+AdamW). OrthoInit + muP scaling. SmearGate + BigramHash(2048x128). FA3. Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048. Note: Late QAT flag is present in the code but inactive due to torch.compile constant-folding.
claimed_method_summary: 11 layers with Partial RoPE (16 of 64 dims), LN Scale (1/sqrt(l+1)), EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997), Exclusive Self Attention (XSA) on last 4 layers. Int6 per-row on all MLP+attention weights, int8 tok_emb, zstd-22. Weight decay 0.04 (Muon+AdamW). OrthoInit + muP scaling. SmearGate + BigramHash(2048x128). FA3. Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048. Note: Late QAT flag is present in the code but inactive due to torch.compile constant-folding.
